headline: Smith (A.O.) Corp (NYSE:AOS) Reliable Dividend Growth With Strong Financial Health
summary: Smith (A.O.) Corp offers a reliable 2.50% dividend yield backed by strong financial health. With a Dividend Rating of 8/10, low 37% payout ratio, high profitability, and 10-year payment history, it's positioned for sustainable dividend growth.
